Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Personal portfolio site with React + Vite

- Two-column layout with sticky sidebar containing bio and contact info
- Resume page with work experience from JSON data
- Portfolio page with filterable project grid
- Case study pages with full project details template
- About page with bio content
- Navigation bar with routing \(React Router\)
- Responsive design for tablet and mobile breakpoints
- Dark theme with Schibsted Grotesk and Geist fonts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
